suite.name: Om-Prepare

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.arg: Create Specific OM data for prepare
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Create Specific OM data for prepare
Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

2026-02-12 16:04:56,899 [Thread-3] INFO freon.ProgressBar: Progress: 0.00 % (0 out of 100) 2026-02-12 16:04:57,901 [Thread-3] INFO freon.ProgressBar: Progress: 12.00 % (12 out of 100) 2026-02-12 16:04:58,901 [Thread-3] INFO freon.ProgressBar: Progress: 39.00 % (39 out of 100) 2026-02-12 16:04:59,902 [Thread-3] INFO freon.ProgressBar: Progress: 71.00 % (71 out of 100) 2026-02-12 16:05:00,902 [Thread-3] INFO freon.ProgressBar: Progress: 100.00 % (100 out of 100) 2026-02-12 16:05:00,931 [shutdown-hook-0] INFO metrics: type=TIMER, name=key-create, count=100, min=24.266284, max=927.392823, mean=46.871318352724, stddev=91.20637438492311, median=34.226883, p75=38.666564, p95=54.331774, p98=229.962738, p99=236.341767, p999=927.392823, mean_rate=20.431679899535307, m1=0.0, m5=0.0, m15=0.0, rate_unit=events/second, duration_unit=milliseconds 2026-02-12 16:05:00,932 [shutdown-hook-0] INFO freon.BaseFreonGenerator: Total execution time (sec): 6 2026-02-12 16:05:00,932 [shutdown-hook-0] INFO freon.BaseFreonGenerator: Failures: 0 2026-02-12 16:05:00,932 [shutdown-hook-0] INFO freon.BaseFreonGenerator: Successful executions: 100

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.msg:
${output} = Ozone Manager Prepare Request successfully returned with Transaction Id : [207].
Checking individual OM instances for prepare request completion... OM : [om1], Prepare Status : [PREPARE_COMPLETED], C...

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg:
Ozone Manager Prepare Request successfully returned with Transaction Id : [207].
Checking individual OM instances for prepare request completion... OM : [om1], Prepare Status : [PREPARE_COMPLETED], Current Transaction Id : [207] OM : [om3], Prepare Status : [NOT_PREPARED], Current Transaction Id : [-1] OM : [om2], Prepare Status : [NOT_PREPARED], Current Transaction Id : [-1] Waiting for 10 seconds before retrying... OM : [om3], Prepare Status : [PREPARE_COMPLETED], Current Transaction Id : [207] OM : [om2], Prepare Status : [PREPARE_COMPLETED], Current Transaction Id : [207]
OM Preparation successful! All OMs are prepared No new write requests will be allowed until preparation is cancelled or upgrade/downgrade is done.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

${result} = Ozone Manager Prepare Request successfully returned with Transaction Id : [207].
Checking individual OM instances for prepare request completion... OM : [om1], Prepare Status : [PREPARE_COMPLETED], C...

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Checks if the expected data is present in OM

kw.name: Run Keyword If

suite.doc: Smoke test to test preparing OMs in an OM HA cluster.

suite.name: Om-Cancel-Prepare

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Execute and checkrc
Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = NOT_SUPPORTED_OPERATION_WHEN_PREPARED Cannot apply write request CreateVolume when OM is in prepare mode.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: NOT_SUPPORTED_OPERATION_WHEN_PREPARED Cannot apply write request CreateVolume when OM is in prepare mode.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: ${result} = NOT_SUPPORTED_OPERATION_WHEN_PREPARED Cannot apply write request CreateVolume when OM is in prepare mode.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

suite.doc: Smoke test to test that OMs are prepared in an OM HA cluster.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
